---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new rule or a configuration option for an existing rule
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What Problem Does This Solve?

Describe the code smell, naming issue, or quality problem you want to detect or prevent.

## Proposed Rule or Option

If you are proposing a new rule, describe what it should detect and how it should be configured. If you are proposing an option for an existing rule, name the rule and describe the option.

## Example

A code snippet showing the case the rule should flag (and, if relevant, a case it should not flag):

```php
// would be flagged

// would NOT be flagged
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any existing PHPStan or MeliorStan rules that partially cover this? Why are they not enough?
